title: TSP03-1_D
description:
This beautiful bouquet's delicate colors are a reminder that spring is a time for rebirth, the world over!

Deluxe contains yellow roses.

Premium contains yellow and pink roses.

Includes:
• Red Alstroemeria
• Yellow Carnations
• Pink Stock
• Hot Pink Asters
• Purple Monte Casino
• Yellow Button Poms
• Cylinder Glass Vase
symbolism: TSP03-1_Ds represent unfading love—in Greek mythology, TSP03-1_Ds grew from the spilled blood

title: TEV12-4
description:
With a mix of everything pretty, the Pretty Please bouquet is great to give on any occasion! A mixture of wonderful colors, from ethereal light pink to bright green, lovely lavender and clean white, all tied up with a bright pink bow. The color and flower combinations makes this bouquet one of our most popular - and for good reason! These flowers will bring a smile to someone's face and be the highlight of their day!

Includes:
• Pink Spray Roses
• Pink Alstroemeria
• White Daisies
• Green Button Poms
• Purple Monte Casino
• Limonium
• Glass Vase
• Hot Pink Ribbon

Pet Safety Precautions: Please be sure to keep out of pets reach as this bouquet or plant may include flowers and foliage that are known to be toxic to pets.
symbolism: TEV12-4s represent unfading love—in Greek mythology, TEV12-4s grew from the spilled blood

title: T46-1
description:
An easy way to remind someone you care and are thinking about them - the How Sweet It Is bouquet. Brighten someone's day with this beautiful arrangement of orange spray roses, orange roses, hot pink carnations and asters. This bouquet is ideal for a birthday, as a thank you, or just to let someone know you're thinking about them!

Includes:
• Light Orange Roses
• Orange Spray Roses
• Hot Pink Carnations
• Matsumoto Asters
• Clear Glass Vase

Pet Safety Precautions: Please be sure to keep out of pets reach as this bouquet or plant may include flowers and foliage that are known to be toxic to pets.
symbolism: T46-1 represent unfading love—in Greek mythology, T46-1 grew from the spilled blood

title: V7013
description:
Take in the hues of a bright morning as the sun rises. This bouquet of flowers has a chic farmhouse style while still staying modern. Bright sunflowers surrounded by pink alstroemeria and green poms are displayed in a mason jar wrapped in raffia. The essence of a field of flowers in the early morning can be brought to your loved ones homes, and will charm anyone who sees it!

Includes:
• Sunflowers
• Red Alstroemeria
• Pink Roses (Deluxe & Premium Only)
• Purple Monte Cassino
• Green Button Poms
• Mason Jar Vase
• Personalized Card Message

Pet Safety Precautions: Please be sure to keep out of pets reach as this bouquet or plant may include flowers and foliage that are known to be toxic to pets.
symbolism: V7013 represent unfading love—in Greek mythology, V7013 grew from the spilled blood

title: V7010
description:
Send stunning flowers to celebrate any occasion! With classic floral colors including red roses and pink lilies, the Rose and Lily Joy is a wonderful gift to send to a friend or family member for a birthday, get well or anniversary. The flowers are arranged by hand at a local florist shop. The floral artist creates the Rose and Lily bouquet with red roses, pink roses, pink lilies, pink alstroemeria and purple waxflower. Paired with the flowers is a keepsake clear vase that is wrapped in a decorative ribbon. Measures 14"H by 12"L.

Includes:
• Pink Asiatic Lilies
• Pink and Red Roses
• Purple Waxflowers
• Alstroemeria
• Glass Vase
• Personalized Card Message
symbolism: V7010 represent unfading love—in Greek mythology, V7010 grew from the spilled blood

title: V7012
description:
A best selling bouquet for your friends and family. This arrangement is made of bright yellow roses, white lilies, blue delphinium and purple monte casino, all in a clear vase guaranteed to stand out. No matter the occasion, they will light up when receiving this beautiful bouquet.

Includes:
• White Asiatic Lilies
• Yellow Roses
• Blue Delphinium
• Purple Monte Cassino
• Clear Glass Vase
• Complimentary Card Message

title: TEV55-3
description:
Looking for a floral arrangement that will suit just about any occasion? You came to the right place! Send this Light Pink Beauty! Overflowing with fresh carnations and alstromerias, this bouquet will arrive to your recipient's doorstep and take their breath away! Delicately arranged with a glass vase, this beautiful bouquet is sure to make that special someone smile.

• Pink Alstroemeria
• Pink Carnations
• White Mini Carnations

• Leatherleaf Fern

• Clear Glass Vase

title: Anemone
description: I love anemones—their jewel- bright colors are so welcome after a long, dreary winter. Anemones' bold color and shape lend themselves perfectly to a simple, single- flower-type arrangement. They also have a good amount of their own green in the form of a fetching "ruff," which frames their faces. As well as their surprisingly long vase life, anemon
symbolism: Anemones represent unfading love—in Greek mythology, anemones grew from the spilled blood

title: Freesia
description: Freesia lactea is a strongly scented species. This variety is called ‘Double White.' Freesias' dainty blooms adorn the top of their elegant, narrow stems in arching clusters. title: Fritillary
description: Fritillaria Snake's head fritillaries' unique, checkerboard pattern will add a touch of class to any arrangement. There are many species of fritillary used for cutting. Some of my favorites are the statuesque and dramatic Persian lily (F. persica) and crown imperial fritillary (F. imperialis), as well as the delicate and wild snake's head fritillar

title: Hellebore
description: Helleborus Hellebores have an understated air that suits the soft light of late winter and early spring. The flowers of the Lenten rose (Helleborus orientalis) are the first cut flowers of the season, and one of the longest lasting in the garden. Even after fertilization, the petals do not fall, but remain to protect the ripening seedhead. Selectiv

title: Muscari
description: An easy plant to grow, muscari has perfectly formed, conical- shaped clusters of flowers. Muscari's common name, grape hyacinth, refers to the flowers being similar in appearance to a bunch of grapes. title: Iris

description: develop into seed pods—use this variety in form to add interest to arrangements.

title: Rose
description: Rosa The queen of cut flowers, rose's beauty and scent make it many people's favorite flower. This quintessentially English flower comes in a staggering range of varieties. symbolism: Rosa ‘Proper Job' has a quartered- rosette form that is often referred to as “an old-fashioned rose.”

description: Achillea Yarrow's color palette reminds me of a Persian rug, with deep reds and pinks to golden yellow.

title: Cosmos
description: Cosmos has an understated elegance with its crinkled petals and open flowers. Two types of cosmos are used as cut flowers.
symbolism: Cosmos has an understated elegance with its crinkled petals and open flowers.

title: Dahlia
description: member of the ball group of dahlias. It has good stem length and vase life, so it is an excellent variety for cutting.

title: Sunflower
description: Helianthus annuus You cannot help but be cheered by the open, sunny face of a sunflower. The best sunflowers for cutting are the annual, pollen-free cultivars. title: Hydrangea
description: ‘Grandiflora' is a woody shrub with conical, lace-cap flower heads.
symbolism: Hydrangeas' voluminous flowers change color, aging to beautiful antique shades.

title: Hypericum
description: The glossy, perky hypericum berry is one of my favorite fillers for late summer and fall. Hypericum, or St. John's wort, is covered with a profusion of small, bright-yellow flowers in midsummer. But the plant's main event is the showier berries that follow the flowers in late summer. Clustered on branching woody stems, hypericum berries come in a r
symbolism: Hypericum has long been used as a treatment for mild depression, and as a salve for cuts.

title: Zinnia
description: The party animals of the cut-flower world, zinnias appear in a festive array of bright colors. Zinnias are single or double daisylike flowers. Their brightly colored, papery petals and intricate, jewel-like centers make them look almost artificial. title: Jasmine
description: In the language of flowers, white jasmine is a symbol of amiability, and yellow jasmine a symbol of elegance.
